label: Metaconceptual Art origin provenance
description: Machine-readable origin chronology for Metaconceptual Art. This file distinguishes the studio formation, movement origin, early artwork evidence, and later public linked-data publication so the project is not framed as a retrospective 2026 invention.

events.label: Sun & Rain Works established
events.description: Sun & Rain Works was established as the art business and studio context for the later Metaconceptual Art movement.

events.label: Metaconceptual Art movement created
events.description: Metaconceptual Art is asserted by Sun & Rain Works as a movement created in 2007, before the 2026 linked-data publication layer.

events.label: March 2009 artwork receipts and metadata
events.description: The studio reports March 2009 receipts, metadata, and related documentation for early Metaconceptual Art works. Those records can be promoted to public, metadata-only, or full Linked Art records when ready.

events.label: Public linked-data publication
events.description: The 2026 web publication makes the movement, profile, selected works, and records machine-readable as Linked Art, IIIF, JSON-LD, SHACL, VoID, and DCAT.

comparisonPolicy.label: Comparison and priority policy
comparisonPolicy.description: Earlier studio evidence may establish priority for a documented Metaconceptual Art structure without asserting direct influence on later artists or events unless evidence of contact, access, or derivation is separately published.
comparisonPolicy.recommendedClaim: Documented prior evidence for a related metaconceptual structure.
comparisonPolicy.avoidClaim: Direct influence, copying, or misattribution without separate evidence.
